blended.narrative: Steamboat is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,369 ft. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 52".
